summary_en: Correction notice to May 13 disclosure on cost-of-capital and stock-price conscious management. Amended risk-free rate definition (10-year JGB compounded yield as of March 31, 2026) and dividend/DOE chart unit from yen to million yen. Specific COC targets not detailed in this correction.
title_en: Correction to 'Initiatives Toward Realization of Management Conscious of Cost of Capital and Stock Price'
translation_en_brief: This is a correction notice to a disclosure issued on May 13, 2026 regarding Daiichi Kensetsu's approach to cost-of-capital and stock-price conscious management. The correction amends two items: (1) the definition of the risk-free rate used in the analysis, correcting the reference to the 10-year JGB compounded yield (複利終値) as of March 31, 2026, and (2) the unit of measurement in the dividend total and DOE (dividend on equity) graph, changing from yen to million yen. The correction notice itself does not disclose specific COC targets or dividend metrics; the full policy details are contained in the original May 13 disclosure.
